<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 700 50" style="background-color: #00000000;" width="700px" height="50px">

    <style>
@font-face {
  font-family: 'Fira Code';
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-display: fallback;
  src: url(data:font/truetype;base64,) format('truetype');
}
</style>

                <path id="path0">
                            <!-- Single line -->
                                <animate id="d0" attributeName="d" begin="0s;d3.end" dur="4000ms" fill="remove" values="m0,25 h0 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h0" keyTimes="0;0.6;0.85;1"/>
                    </path>
    <text font-family="&quot;Fira Code&quot;, monospace" fill="#00F7FF" font-size="26" dominant-baseline="middle" x="50%" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="normal">
        <textPath xlink:href="#path0">
            C++ | C# | .NET | Windows Forms | SQL Server
        </textPath>
    </text>
        <path id="path1">
                            <!-- Single line -->
                                <animate id="d1" attributeName="d" begin="d0.end" dur="4000ms" fill="remove" values="m0,25 h0 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h0" keyTimes="0;0.6;0.85;1"/>
                    </path>
    <text font-family="&quot;Fira Code&quot;, monospace" fill="#00F7FF" font-size="26" dominant-baseline="middle" x="50%" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="normal">
        <textPath xlink:href="#path1">
            OOP | Data Structures
        </textPath>
    </text>
        <path id="path2">
                            <!-- Single line -->
                                <animate id="d2" attributeName="d" begin="d1.end" dur="4000ms" fill="remove" values="m0,25 h0 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h0" keyTimes="0;0.6;0.85;1"/>
                    </path>
    <text font-family="&quot;Fira Code&quot;, monospace" fill="#00F7FF" font-size="26" dominant-baseline="middle" x="50%" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="normal">
        <textPath xlink:href="#path2">
            Algorithms &amp; Problem Solving
        </textPath>
    </text>
        <path id="path3">
                            <!-- Single line -->
                                <animate id="d3" attributeName="d" begin="d2.end" dur="4000ms" fill="remove" values="m0,25 h0 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h700 ; m0,25 h0" keyTimes="0;0.6;0.85;1"/>
                    </path>
    <text font-family="&quot;Fira Code&quot;, monospace" fill="#00F7FF" font-size="26" dominant-baseline="middle" x="50%" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="normal">
        <textPath xlink:href="#path3">
            Future Software Developer
        </textPath>
    </text>
</svg>
<div align="center">
  <img height="150" src="https://media.giphy.com/media/M9gbBd9nbDrOTu1Mqx/giphy.gif"  />
</div>
